forum.header.categoriesBody: Shape navigation clusters, assign moderation rules, and keep every forum area ready for new threads.
forum.header.topicsBody: Review topic flow, open a thread for reply preview, and keep publishing controls next to the live feed.
forum.error.categoryRequired: Category name and slug are required.
forum.error.topicRequired: Category, title and body are required.
forum.categories.matrixBody: This view keeps category hierarchy, counts, and moderation switches close together so moderators can shape the forum like a community map instead of a plain CRUD table.
forum.categories.noteIconBody: Use both so each category reads like a quick visual stop in the sidebar.
forum.categories.notePositionBody: Lower numbers bubble important sections to the top of the community map.
forum.categories.noteModeratedBody: Turn this on for queues that need stricter review before topics go live.
forum.form.localeHintTopic: Thread locale for publishing and reads.
forum.form.name: Name
forum.form.nameHint: Human-friendly label shown in the admin and forum nav.
forum.form.slugHintCategory: Stable identifier for routing and lookups.
forum.form.iconHint: Optional short token or icon name.
forum.form.positionHint: Lower comes first in the list.
forum.form.moderatedHint: Topics in this category should flow through stricter review.
forum.form.categoryHint: Choose where the topic should live.
forum.form.title: Title
forum.form.bodyHint: Main message shown in the topic detail.
forum.topics.navigationBody: A left rail similar to NodeBB: jump between categories, keep counts visible, and open a thread into the editor on the right.
forum.topics.streamBody: Open a topic card to inspect replies and edit the thread without leaving the feed.
forum.render.openTopicForReplies: Open a topic card to preview replies.
forum.categories.seo.title: Category SEO
forum.categories.seo.subtitle: Explicit metadata, social tags and diagnostics for the selected forum category.
forum.categories.seo.empty: Create or open a category first. SEO stays attached to the forum category editor.
forum.topics.seo.title: Topic SEO
forum.topics.seo.subtitle: Explicit metadata, social tags and diagnostics for the selected forum topic.
forum.topics.seo.empty: Create or open a topic first. SEO stays attached to the forum thread editor.
